text: Intel stock soars on Q1 earnings beat, strong outlook - Yahoo Finance
fullText: Intel reported better-than-expected Q1 earnings and offered a rosy outlook for Q2.

text: Sources: Bucks finalizing deal to hire Taylor Jenkins - ESPN
fullText: The Milwaukee Bucks are finalizing a deal to hire Taylor Jenkins as the franchise's new head coach, sources told ESPN on Thursday.

text: Family held longest in immigration detention ordered released by judge - NBC News
fullText: Hayam El Gamal, whose ex-husband was accused of a fatal firebombing attack in Colorado, and her five children have been held at a facility in Dilley, Texas, for over 10 months.

text: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows - BBC
fullText: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.

text: Chinese Satellites Over Mideast Battlefield Put U.S. on Edge - WSJ

fullText: Asha Sharma has a new strategy for her return of Xbox.

text: 10 people shot at Mall of Louisiana; 2 in critical condition - WAFB
fullText: Officials confirmed one person is dead and nine others are injured following a shooting at the Mall of Louisiana.

text: US Labels State-Licensed Marijuana as Less Dangerous Drug - Bloomberg.com
fullText: The US Justice Department reclassified state-regulated marijuana as a less dangerous drug, a major shift that could increase legal cannabis sales and help a struggling industry.

text: Meet the 19 metre octopus that may have prowled ancient seas - BBC
fullText: Giant octopuses may have ruled the oceans 100 million years ago, according to fossil evidence.

text: Justice Department watchdog probes compliance with Epstein Act - NBC News
fullText: The Justice Department's internal watchdog is investigating compliance with the Epstein Files Transparency Act, a law that compelled the department to release records related to the case of convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein

text: Apple's M4 Mac mini, including the $599 one, is gradually becoming impossible to buy - Ars Technica
fullText: Pending refresh? RAM shortage? AI agents? There are many possible explanations.

text: US health officials nix publication of a study on Covid vaccine effectiveness - NBC News
fullText: U.S. health officials stopped the publication of a study on whether the Covid-19 vaccine was keeping adults from becoming sick enough to have to go to the hospital

text: Eight months early and under budget, the Roman Telescope is ready to launch - Ars Technica
fullText: Spy satellite hardware has been repurposed to scan the Universe in the infrared.

fullText: As the 2026 NFL Draft approaches, NFL.com is keeping you up the date with the latest reports, rumors and rumblings from NFL Network, ESPN and team officials. Here's what we're learning Thursday ahead of tonight's first round.

text: Live Updates: Iran touts video of Strait of Hormuz cargo ship seizures as Trump keeps quiet on next move - CBS News
fullText: Iran releases video showing commandos seizing ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump remains largely silent on his next move in the war.

text: UK and French governments sign a 3-year deal to curb migrant crossings in English Channel - AP News
fullText: The U.K. and French governments have signed a new multimillion-euro deal to reduce migrant crossings in the English Channel. U.K. Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood and French Interior Minister Laurent Nuñez endorsed the three-year agreement during a joint visit …

text: Hollywood Petition to Block Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger Tops 4,000 Names as Robert De Niro, Sofia Coppola, Holly Hunter and More Join the Fight - Variety
fullText: including Robert De Niro, Sofia Coppola and Holly Hunter have signed joined an open letter opposing the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger, which now has more than 4,000 signatories.

text: NJ warns of possible measles exposures at Newark Airport - Gothamist
fullText: A Hudson County resident was diagnosed with measles after returning from an international trip, the state health department said.
